all_games.summary: The Pittsburgh Pirates' pitching staff dominated the Chicago Cubs, with Shota Imanaga tossing a shutout. Bryan Reynolds' solo homer provided the offense for the Pirates.
The Arizona Diamondbacks edged the Philadelphia Phillies in a back-and-forth game. Brandon Marsh's three-run homer proved decisive for the Diamondbacks.
The Detroit Tigers' pitching staff shut down the Miami Marlins, with Keider Montero tossing a shutout. Javier Báez's solo homer was the only offense for the Marlins.
The Los Angeles Angels' offense exploded against the Cincinnati Reds, with Jorge Soler's four RBIs leading the way.
The Toronto Blue Jays' offense overwhelmed the Minnesota Twins, with Ryan Jeffers' three RBIs leading the way.
The Athletics' pitching staff shut down the New York Mets, with a strong team effort.

all_games.game: New York Yankees @ Tampa Bay Rays
all_games.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays' offense outlasted the New York Yankees, with Yandy Díaz's two RBIs leading the way. Steven Matz's strong start was not enough for the Yankees.
The San Francisco Giants' offense outlasted the Baltimore Orioles, with Willy Adames' two RBIs leading the way.

all_games.top_batting_line: Ronald Acuña Jr.: 2 H, 1 HR, 2 RBI
all_games.summary: The Atlanta Braves' offense overwhelmed the Cleveland Guardians, with Ronald Acuña Jr.'s two RBIs leading the way.

all_games.game: Chicago White Sox @ Kansas City Royals
all_games.summary: The Kansas City Royals' pitching staff shut down the Chicago White Sox, with Kris Bubic tossing a shutout. Carter Jensen's solo homer was the only offense for the White Sox.
The Washington Nationals' offense outlasted the Milwaukee Brewers, with Jake Bauers' three RBIs leading the way. Jake Irvin's strong start was not enough for the Brewers.

all_games.game: Boston Red Sox @ St. Louis Cardinals
all_games.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals' pitching staff outlasted the Boston Red Sox, with Connelly Early's strong start leading the way.
The San Diego Padres' offense outlasted the Colorado Rockies, with Gavin Sheets' four RBIs leading the way.
The Seattle Mariners' offense overwhelmed the Houston Astros, with Yordan Alvarez's three RBIs leading the way. Emerson Hancock's strong start was not enough for the Astros.

all_games.top_pitching_line: Kumar Rocker: 5.0 IP, 5 K, 3 ER; Tyler Glasnow: 6.0 IP, 7 K, 4 ER
all_games.summary: The Los Angeles Dodgers' offense outlasted the Texas Rangers, with Corey Seager's three RBIs leading the way. A strong pitching effort from both teams was not enough to secure a win.
